title: Ubiquiti POE-24-30W, Gigabit PoE Injector, 24V/1.25A (30W)
description: High-quality, stabilized Gigabit PoE power adapter with earthing, LED indication and output voltage 24V and max. current 1.25A. The maximum output power is 30W. This model has power on all 4 pairs. The PoE adapter is only compatible with 1Gbps devices that support power on all 4pairs (8pins) PoE adapter Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Output Power [W] 30 Pin powering 1,2,4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 24 Output Current [A] 1,25 Efficiency [%] 80+
